data.title: Zitro impresses at G2E Las Vegas 2025 with biggest showcase yet, unveiling premium cabinet FANTASY.
data.description: Luxembourg, October 16, 2025 - Zitro made a major announcement at G2E Las Vegas 2025 by revealing FANTASY, their latest premium cabinet. This unveiling was highly anticipated by many and exceeded expectations. FANTASY is the pinnacle of the company's hardware offerings, delivering a unique experience that seamlessly integrates design, technology, and emotion.

data.title: Rondo Energy unveils 100 MWh industrial heat battery, providing 24-hour steam from off-grid solar power.
data.description: Rondo Energy has unveiled the groundbreaking 100 MWh Rondo Heat Battery, acclaimed as the most efficient energy storage system globally. This innovation is currently generating 24-hour steam using off-grid solar power. The achievement signifies a significant milestone for industrial facilities seeking to reduce both their carbon footprint and operational expenses. The facility, located in Alameda, California, initiated operations on October 16, 2025, marking a crucial step towards sustainable energy practices. This development showcases a new avenue for factories to enhance their environmental impact significantly while simultaneously benefiting from cost savings.

data.title: Rekor Technology awarded $1 million contract for virtual weigh stations in South Carolina, targeting overweight trucks efficiently, more deployments expected.
data.description: An initial purchase order totaling around $1 million has been placed, with anticipated higher revenue as the deployment expands throughout South Carolina and potentially beyond.

data.title: OTC Markets Group welcomes Seneca Bancorp, Inc. to OTCQX, trading 12,000 securities, upgrading from OTCID Basic Market.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Seneca Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: SNNF), the parent company of Seneca Savings Bank, National Association, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees trading for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Seneca Bancorp, Inc. transitioned from the OTCID™ Basic Market following its reorganization from Seneca Financial Corp. to its current status.

data.title: Cellectis holds R&D Day in NYC showcasing pipeline progress, discussing Phase 1 data and Phase 2 trial for lasme-cel in r/r B-ALL.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Cellectis held an R&D Day in New York City to present its Phase 1 dataset and discuss the Phase 2 trial design and commercial potential for lasme-cel in r/r B-ALL. Cellectis, traded as ALCLS on Euronext Growth and CLLS on NASDAQ, is a clinical-stage biotech company specializing in gene editing for developing life-saving cell and gene therapies. The event featured the Company's leadership team and key opinion leaders, focusing on the significant advancements in the field.

data.title: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. will host a conference call on Oct. 30, 2025, to discuss Q3 results; call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, October 16, 2025 - ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNOB), the parent company of ConnectOne Bank, disclosed that they are set to unveil their third-quarter results for the period ending September 30, 2025, before the market commences on Thursday, October 30, 2025. Following this release, there will be a conference call and audio webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, aimed at examining the Company's financial outcomes and operational achievements.

data.title: Foghorn Therapeutics to provide updates on Selective ARID1B, CBP, and EP300 degrader programs on Oct 30, 2025, 12 p.m. EDT.
data.description: Foghorn will be holding a virtual investor event on October 30, 2025, at 12 p.m. EDT to provide updates on its Selective ARID1B, Selective CBP, and Selective EP300 degrader programs. This event aims to offer valuable insights into the progress of these important projects to potential investors. Make sure to mark your calendars for this significant event.

data.title: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance sets Q3 2025 earnings release on Oct. 16, 2025, as a commercial mortgage REIT.
data.description: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NASDAQ: REFI), a commercial mortgage real estate investment trust based in Chicago, disclosed its plans to unveil its third-quarter financial results for the period ending on September 30, 2025. No further specifics were provided in the announcement made on October 16, 2025.

data.title: PyroGenesis closes first tranche of private placement, raises $3.5 million by issuing 5,555,556 units at $0.63 each.
data.description: PyroGenesis Inc. based in Montreal revealed on Oct. 16, 2025, that they have successfully closed the initial portion of the First Unit Group in a non-brokered private placement. They issued 5,555,556 Units at $0.63 each, generating around $3,500,000 in total. PyroGenesis is recognized for pioneering advancements in ultra-high temperature processes and engineering, serving heavy industry and defense sectors. This development follows a prior announcement on October 1, 2025.

data.title: EyePoint granted non-statutory stock options to new employees outside its long-term incentive plan, per NASDAQ Rule.
data.description: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Watertown, Massachusetts, made an announcement on October 16, 2025, regarding granting non-statutory stock options to new employees as inducement awards outside the Company's 2023 Long-Term Incentive Plan. This was done in accordance with NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, trading under the symbol EYPT on the Nasdaq, focuses on developing and commercializing therapeutics for serious retinal diseases to enhance patient lives. This move is aimed at attracting new talent to the company.

data.title: SINTX secures new patent for infection prevention in $30B market, boosting competitive edge and revenue potential.
data.description: The recent issuance of a new U.S. patent has bolstered the company's competitive position by providing protection for its innovative technology. This patent opens up opportunities for the company to expand its licensing agreements and introduce new products in various key markets. With this development, the company can leverage its intellectual property rights to drive growth and secure a strong foothold in the industry.
